p258g.hardening_coverage: synthetic fixtures only — no real candidate methods

forbidden_imports_for_future_integration: random (stdlib — no randomness in contract validation)
allowed_import_boundary_plan.rationale: Contract validation must remain pure metadata/schema checking. It must not introduce any statistical computation, data access, or production-path dependencies.

candidate_provenance_contract.source: frozen OOS artifact — must not be derived from live DB at validation time

p257a_baseline_contract.alignment_requirement: lottery_type, target_draw_id, n_bet_count must match candidate

matched_null_metadata_contract.important: validates metadata alignment ONLY — does not generate or execute nulls

correction_family_declaration_contract.schema_class: dict or dataclass with required collection fields
correction_family_declaration_contract.important: declares correction family membership — does not compute corrections

status_result_contract.important: GateStatus enum is sealed — no new values may be added without explicit authorization

validator_invocation_order.rationale: Fail-closed ordering: safety and completeness checks run first, so partial objects cannot reach alignment or family validators.

ordered_validators.purpose: confirm GateOutput.gate_decision is REJECTED or NOT_YET_REJECTED; block forbidden approval tokens
ordered_validators.fail_behavior: raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation

ordered_validators.purpose: confirm all required CandidateInput fields are present and non-empty; check positive-integer numeric fields
ordered_validators.fail_behavior: raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation
raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation

ordered_validators.purpose: confirm baseline lottery_type, target_draw_id, n_bet_count match candidate
ordered_validators.fail_behavior: raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation

ordered_validators.purpose: confirm matched-null metadata (lottery_type, n_bet_count, numbers_per_bet, window_schedule, feature_dimensionality, regime_count) aligns with candidate; no null generation
ordered_validators.fail_behavior: raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation

ordered_validators.purpose: confirm multiple-testing family declaration contains all required non-empty collections
ordered_validators.fail_behavior: raise ContractValidationError — blocks all further validation

fail_closed_behavior.rationale: Fail-closed guarantees that partial or malformed contract objects cannot silently pass validation. A pipeline that catches ContractValidationError and continues is a forbidden pattern.
forbidden_patterns: treating NOT_YET_REJECTED as equivalent to APPROVED
treating validation success as authorization for production/recommendation use

future_validation_report_schema.description: Schema for the read-only validation report that a future P258I integration skeleton would produce. This schema is defined here as a plan artifact — no code generates it yet.

validation_scope.description: Identifies which contracts were in scope for this validation run (e.g., 'P258H_contract_validation_only')

validators_run.description: Ordered list of validator function names that were invoked

validation_results.description: One ValidationResult per successful validator (validator name + checked_fields tuple)

failures.description: One entry per ContractValidationError raised; includes validator name and error message. Empty if all validators passed.

forbidden_actions_confirmed.description: Explicit enumeration of forbidden actions that were NOT performed (e.g., 'no null generation', 'no p-value computation', 'no DB write')

final_contract_status.description: Summary status — only two values allowed; no approval semantics

no_approval_semantics.description: Must always be true; confirms that ALL_CONTRACTS_VALID does not mean approval, promotion, or production readiness

invariants: final_contract_status == 'ALL_CONTRACTS_VALID' does NOT imply improved prediction accuracy
final_contract_status == 'ALL_CONTRACTS_VALID' does NOT allow production or recommendation use
no_approval_semantics must be true in every report
failures list must be non-empty whenever final_contract_status == 'CONTRACT_VALIDATION_FAILED'

integration_flow_placement.description: Where contract validation would sit in a future read-only D3 validation flow.
integration_flow_placement.flow_position: pre-gate metadata guard — runs before any gate evaluation, null scoring, or statistical computation
sequence_in_future_flow: Step 1 (P258H scope): Contract validation — validates all input metadata contracts; fail-closed
Step 2 (STOP gate — requires future authorization): Candidate method execution — forbidden until separate task explicitly authorized
Step 3 (STOP gate — requires future authorization): Null generation — forbidden until separate task explicitly authorized
Step 4 (STOP gate — requires future authorization): Gate statistics / p-values — forbidden until separate task explicitly authorized
Step 5 (STOP gate — requires future authorization): Paired test / backtest — forbidden until separate task explicitly authorized
integration_flow_placement.rationale: Contract validation is a pure metadata guard. Placing it first ensures that no downstream gate evaluation, null generation, or statistical computation is attempted with a malformed or policy-violating input object.

stop_gates_for_future_implementation.description: Any future implementation that crosses these gates requires a separate task and explicit authorization.

gates.why_forbidden_here: P258H is plan-only; no real candidate method outputs exist or are used
gate_statistics, gate_orchestrator, and integration_runner are not created in P258H
null_factory is not created in P258H; MatchedNullFamily is metadata-only
no numpy/scipy imports in contract validation modules
no backtest execution in P258H scope

gates.condition: DB / recommendation / production / registry / controlled_apply / deployment path required
gates.why_forbidden_here: all such paths are forbidden in P258H and in the P258 research arc generally
GateStatus enum has no APPROVED value by design; treating NOT_YET_REJECTED as approval is a fatal policy violation

future_task_split.p258i_authorized_scope: Read-only contract-validation integration skeleton only — may create a skeleton integration module that imports schemas.py and gate_validation.py and invokes validators in the specified order, with no executable gate evaluation, no null generation, no real candidate methods, no statistical computation. Requires separate explicit authorization.
future_task_split.executable_gate_evaluation_status: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258I
future_task_split.running_d3_on_real_candidate_methods_sta: FORBIDDEN — requires separate future task and explicit authorization beyond P258I

forbidden_modules_not_created.confirmation: P258H creates no executable D3 runner or integration code

governance.next_authorized_task: P258I — read-only contract-validation integration skeleton only (requires separate explicit authorization)
